source_pr.title: executor: separte analyze v1/v2 code for for analyzeExec
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: yisaer <disxiaofei@163.com>

<!--

### What problem does this PR solve?

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/35200

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

separte analyze v1/v2 code for for analyzeExec

### Check List

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: - // report unexpected/unreasonable data race error on subIndexWorkerWg when running TestAnalyzeVirtualCol test
failure_signature: - // report unexpected/unreasonable data race error on subIndexWorkerWg when running TestAnalyzeVirtualCol test
root_cause_explanation: The case evidence points to `-race` reporting unexpected/unreasonable data race warnings around `subIndexWorkerWg` when running `TestAnalyzeVirtualCol`. The patch splits analyze v1/v2 code paths and reorganizes the NDV pushdown worker/waitgroup wiring (including where `subIndexWorkerWg` is initialized/used) to avoid the race report in this test scenario.
fix_pattern: Refactor analyze executor (split v1/v2 paths) and adjust NDV pushdown worker/waitgroup wiring (`subIndexWorkerWg`) to avoid `-race` data race reports in `TestAnalyzeVirtualCol`.

evidence: evidence: - // report unexpected/unreasonable data race error on subIndexWorkerWg when running TestAnalyzeVirtualCol test
files: executor/BUILD.bazel, executor/analyze.go, executor/analyze_col.go, executor/analyze_col_v2.go, executor/analyze_fast.go
